data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,900 USDT with a Narrowed 1.05% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 12, 2025, 10:57 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,900.26001 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.05% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Trump Predicts Explosive Growth For U.S. Economy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump stated on March 12 that the U.S. economy is set to experience explosive growth. He also commented on Elon Musk, noting that Musk has been treated very unfairly but has never sought his assistance.

data.title: Trump Considers Reducing Tariffs On Canada
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump has indicated that he is contemplating a reduction in tariffs on Canada. When questioned about the possibility of lowering tariffs, he responded with "maybe."

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Indices Show Mixed Performance
data.description: According to Odaily, the major U.S. stock indices experienced fluctuations with the Nasdaq Composite rising over 1% after initially dropping more than 1%. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 Index increased by 0.18%, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average narrowed its losses to 0.46%.

data.title: European Stock Futures Recover Losses Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 12, major European stock index futures have regained some of their earlier losses. The Euro Stoxx 50 futures are currently down by 0.54%, while Germany's DAX index futures have decreased by 0.38%. Additionally, the UK's FTSE 100 index futures have fallen by 1%.

data.title: Pi Network News: Privacy and Centralization Concerns Cast Doubts on Pi Network’s Success
data.description:
The post Pi Network News: Privacy and Centralization Concerns Cast Doubts on Pi Network’s Success appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Pi Network’s core team controls a staggering 82.8 billion Pi Coins out of the total 100 billion supply, according to data from PiScan. This overwhelming concentration of tokens has sparked concerns over decentralization, as such control gives the core team...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/pi-network-news-privacy-and-centralization-concerns-cast-doubts-on-pi-networks-success/

data.title: Hyperliquid responds to the giant whale’s ETH long order liquidation: No protocol loophole, HLP lost about $4 million in 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In response to the market's discussion on the liquidation of 0xf3f4 user's ETH long orders, Hyperliquid officially responded that this incident was not a protocol vulnerability or hacker attack, but because the user withdrew unrealized profits (PNL), which caused the margin to drop, thus triggering liquidation.
Hyperliquid said that the user still made a profit of $1.8 million in the end, but HLP (Hyperliquid Liquidity Provider Pool) lost about $4 million in the past 24 hours. Despite this, HLP's historical cumulative PNL remained at about $60 million.
In addition, Hyperliquid announced that it would adjust leverage restrictions to optimize liquidation management:
BTC maximum leverage adjusted to 40 times
ETH maximum leverage adjusted to 25 times
Increase maintenance margin requirements for large positions to enhance market buffer capacity during large-scale liquidations.

data.title: Solana’s 24-hour revenue surpasses Ethereum’s
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DefiLlam data, Solana's 24-hour revenue is temporarily reported at US$442,467, surpassing Ethereum (US$419,374).

data.title: Bitget Wallet adds 1 million BGB staking pool, providing a fixed financial management income of 5% APY
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced the addition of 1 million BGB on-chain staking pools, where users can enjoy a 5% APY fixed return, lock up for 90 days, and each person can stake up to 2,000 BGB. Users can enter the wealth management page through Bitget Wallet, select BGB staking, enter the amount and confirm, and then lock and view the income in real time.
This staking plan provides a more robust on-chain wealth management option and enhances the application value of BGB in the decentralized ecosystem. BGB is accelerating the expansion of on-chain applications such as payment, trading, and staking to earn coins, and supports multi-chain gas fee payments. Starting in 2025, the Bitget platform will implement a quarterly repurchase and destruction plan to further enhance the value of BGB.

data.title: Solana Surpasses Ethereum in 24-Hour Revenue
data.description: According to Odaily, data from DefiLlama indicates that Solana's 24-hour revenue has reached $442,467, surpassing Ethereum's $419,374.
